```prompt
---
description: Architecture + design phase — ADR, API shape, data model, test strategy. No code.
---

# Design: ${input:featureName}

## Feature description

${input:description}

## Your role in this phase

You are the **architect**. Produce a design document only — no implementation, no file edits.
The output of this phase feeds directly into `api-contract`, `new-endpoint`, and `db-migration`.

---

## Step 1 — Understand the existing system

Read these files before designing anything:

| File | Why |
|------|-----|
| `backend/src/main/resources/application.yaml` | Understand config surface area |
| `backend/src/main/java/…/controller/UserController.java` | Canonical controller pattern |
| `backend/src/main/java/…/dto/UserDTO.java` | Canonical DTO pattern |
| `backend/src/main/java/…/model/User.java` | Canonical entity pattern |
| `frontend/src/app/user.service.ts` | Canonical service pattern |
| `frontend/src/app/user.ts` | Canonical model pattern |

Identify: are any existing abstractions reusable? Does this feature require a new aggregate root
or can it compose off an existing one?

---

## Step 2 — Write the Architecture Decision Record

Produce a structured ADR with these sections:

```
# ADR-NNN: ${input:featureName}

## Status
Proposed

## Context
[Why is this feature needed? What constraint or capability gap does it address?]

## Decision
[What approach are we taking? Why this over alternatives?]

## Alternatives considered
[At least 2 alternatives with brief pros/cons]

## Consequences
[What changes downstream? What gets harder? What gets easier?]

## Impact on existing architecture
- Backend layers affected: [model / dao / service / controller / config]
- Frontend components affected: [components, services, routes]
- Schema changes required: [yes/no — describe if yes]
- New dependencies required: [list or none]
```

---

## Step 3 — API shape

Define the HTTP contract for any new or changed endpoints:

```
Method: [GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH]
Path:   /spring-boot-angular/api/[resource]/[subpath]
Auth:   [none / future]

Request body (if applicable):
{
  "field": "type — validation constraints"
}

Response 2xx:
{
  "field": "type"
}

Error responses:
- 400: [when]
- 404: [when]
- 409: [when — if applicable]
```

Base path for all resources: `/spring-boot-angular/api/`
Existing convention: plural resource names, trailing slash optional.

---

## Step 4 — Data model

If schema changes are required:

```sql
-- New table or column additions
-- State: proposed, not yet applied

ALTER TABLE ... ADD COLUMN ...;
-- or
CREATE TABLE ... (
  id         BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
  ...
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
```

Map to JPA entity fields. Note any:
- Sequence generator changes
- Index requirements
- Foreign key constraints
- H2 compatibility considerations (`MODE=PostgreSQL` is active in tests)

---

## Step 5 — Component inventory

List every file that must be **created** or **modified**:

```
Backend (created):
  backend/src/main/java/…/model/[Entity].java
  backend/src/main/java/…/dto/[Entity]DTO.java
  backend/src/main/java/…/dao/[Entity]Dao.java
  backend/src/main/java/…/service/[Entity]Service.java
  backend/src/main/java/…/service/[Entity]ServiceImpl.java
  backend/src/main/java/…/converter/[entity]/[Entity]ToDTOConverter.java
  backend/src/main/java/…/converter/[entity]/[Entity]DTOToModelConverter.java
  backend/src/main/java/…/controller/[Entity]Controller.java (or extend existing)

Backend (modified):
  [list files and what changes]

Frontend (created):
  frontend/src/app/[entity].ts
  frontend/src/app/[entity].service.ts
  frontend/src/app/[entity]-list/
  frontend/src/app/[entity]-detail/

Frontend (modified):
  frontend/src/app/app.module.ts (new declarations)
  frontend/src/app/app-routing.module.ts (new routes)

Tests (created):
  [mirror the above with Spec suffix]
```

---

## Step 6 — Test strategy

Define the test matrix before any code is written:

| Scope | Class | Scenarios |
|-------|-------|-----------|
| Controller | `@WebMvcTest` | happy path, 404, validation 400, malformed input |
| DAO | `@DataJpaTest` | custom query methods only |
| Service | Unit (`@ExtendWith(MockitoExtension.class)`) | if non-trivial logic |
| Frontend service | `HttpTestingController` | each HTTP method, error path |
| Frontend component | `jasmine.SpyObj` | render, user interaction, edge state |

---

## Step 7 — Recommended agent dispatch order

Based on the above, propose the sequence of prompts to run next:

1. `db-migration` — if schema changes exist (required before backend implementation)
2. `api-contract` — validate the HTTP contract design before writing code
3. `new-endpoint` — backend + frontend implementation
4. `add-tests` — if coverage gaps remain post-implementation
5. `code-review` — before merging

---

## On Completion → Write Handoff

Write `.agent-handoff.md` in the repo root with:

```markdown
## Completed prompt: design-feature
## Feature: ${input:featureName}

## ADR summary
[2-3 sentence summary of the decision]

## API shape
[Method + path + key request/response fields]

## Schema changes
[yes/no + summary]

## Files to create/modify
[bulleted list from Step 5]

## Recommended next prompt
[name] — [one-line reason]
```
```
